title: Project index
body: Quick links for reviewing the reusable starter, section library, and development workspaces while the dev server is running.

links.label: Section library
links.description: Browse the current reusable section collection.

links.label: Pagebuilder
links.description: Compose, swap, and review page section recipes.

links.label: Content Editor
links.description: Map page copy and image fields into editable content forms.

links.label: Style guide
links.description: Review shared visual tokens and section defaults.

links.label: Type test
links.description: Review typography hierarchy, text measures, and wrapping behavior.

links.label: Style guide sample page
links.description: Review the live HVAC example page correlated with Style Guide tokens.

links.label: HVAC service
links.description: Current public example service page using the shared section system.

links.label: Client intake
links.description: Choose an intake path for different local business types.

links.label: Home service intake
links.description: Intake flow for repair-first local service businesses.

links.label: Contractor intake
links.description: Intake flow for estimate, project, and larger job businesses.

links.label: Property service intake
links.description: Intake flow for recurring, upkeep, and route-based services.

links.label: Appointment-based intake
links.description: Intake flow for booking, visit, and appointment-led businesses.

links.label: Staged Pages
links.description: Review baked pages that are eligible to become public pages.

links.label: Dashboard
links.description: Lead dashboard route for authenticated workflows.
